title: AI is not going to make mathematicians obsolete
abstract: Are you worried that AI will replace mathematicians? Don't be! Think of AI as your reliable sidekick, offering algorithmic support when solving complex equations, but never stepping in to take the spotlight. In fact, AI enhances the capabilities of mathematicians by providing powerful tools without overshadowing their expertise.
abstract_zh: 你还在担心AI会取代数学家吗？放心吧，AI只会帮你解题，不会抢你的饭碗！想象一下，当你在解决一道复杂的方程时，AI就像个贴心的小助手，在一旁提供算法支持，而不是替代你。这样看来，AI更像是给数学家们加了个强大的队友呢！
